payload.note: The case requires investigation due to significant contradictions: the screened entity (Eastern Star Holdings Ltd) is linked to GB while the matched entity (Eastern Star Holding Company) is associated with SY. Furthermore, there are hard conflicts in incorporation dates and a missing date of birth for the matched organization entity. These contradictions necessitate an analyst review to either corroborate or disprove the matches before making a definitive decision.
evidence_summary: Country mismatch between screened and matched party (GB vs SY)
Date of birth not provided for the matched organization entity
Hard contradiction in incorporation dates (2018-07-07 vs 2009-03-09)
Identifier conflict as names overlap but entities are distinct entities
Entity type support and organization token overlap present
missing_information_summary: Missing corroboration for the date of birth

Additional context or sources to resolve contradictions
